auth.loginSubtitle: Securely manage your orders, favorites, and account from one place.
auth.registerSubtitle: Create your account in minutes and start your 2BEM experience.
auth.name: Full Name
auth.loginHeroTitle: Manage your order flow with one secure sign-in.
auth.loginHeroBody: Access your favorites, order history, and fast shopping flow instantly with your 2BEM account.
auth.registerHeroTitle: Open your new account and speed up the flow.
auth.registerHeroBody: Register in minutes and keep product discovery, orders, and favorites together in a single account experience.
auth.featureFast: Fast sign-in and fluid mobile experience
auth.featureOrders: Orders and favorites in one flow
auth.forgotPasswordSubtitle: Enter your registered e-mail address and we will send you a secure reset link.
auth.forgotPasswordSuccess: If this e-mail is registered, a password reset link has been sent.
auth.forgotPasswordFailure: Password reset request could not be sent.
auth.forgotPasswordHeroBody: The password reset link stays valid for 30 minutes and provides one-time secure access.
auth.resetPasswordSubtitle: Choose a strong password and return to your account with confidence.
auth.resetPasswordSuccess: Your password has been updated. Redirecting to login.
auth.resetPasswordInvalidToken: The password reset link is invalid or expired.
auth.resetPasswordHeroTitle: Protect your account with a new password.
auth.resetPasswordHeroBody: Your new password should be at least 6 characters and avoid predictable combinations you used before.

home.title: 2BEM Product Showcase
home.subtitle: Phase one focuses on a fast, mobile-friendly and service-driven product discovery experience.
home.spotlightTitle: Manage daily discovery, campaigns and category flow at a glance.
home.spotlightBody: We bring a modern marketplace quality storefront with category entry points, focus areas, and quick decision support modules.

new.title: New Arrivals
new.text: A quick discovery space that highlights incoming products.

popular.title: Popular Picks
popular.text: Presents high-demand products in blocks that make decisions easier.

fast.title: Quick Campaigns
fast.text: An ideal storefront structure for short-term price and focus-product highlights.

curation.title: Editorial curation
curation.text: Reduces list clutter and surfaces the most critical products.

responsive.title: Mobile-first flow
responsive.text: Provides fast navigation and clear action-oriented experience on phone screens.

conversion.title: Conversion-focused blocks
conversion.text: Combines campaigns, categories and trust signals in a single flow.

catalog.title: Product Catalog
catalog.empty: No products found for the selected criteria.

commerce.reviewsEmpty: No reviews for this product yet.
commerce.questionsEmpty: No questions for this product yet.
commerce.authRequired: You must be signed in to perform this action.
commerce.noAnswerYet: No answer yet for this question.
commerce.favoritesEmpty: No products added to favorites yet.

admin.title: Backoffice Dashboard
admin.loginSubtitle: Securely access inventory, product, order, and integration operations from one control center.
admin.phase2Note: Next step is product management screens and role-based authorization expansion.
admin.name: Full Name
admin.integrationSubtitle: Monitor product, price, and stock sync jobs; manage manual dispatch and queue operations in drawer forms.
admin.integrationMarketplaceTrendyolSubtitle: Manage the Trendyol store connection, import order packages, and track product matching status.
admin.integrationMarketplaceEmptyPackages: No Trendyol packages have been imported yet.
admin.integrationMarketplaceStatusSyncQueued: Trendyol package status has been notified.
admin.integrationMarketplaceQueued: Sync job has run. Package list has been refreshed.
admin.integrationDrawerDescription: Manage job creation and queue execution through structured drawer forms.
admin.integrationEntityIdsHint: Enter multiple product ids line by line or separated by commas.
admin.integrationStockSyncHint: For stock sync jobs, it is recommended to provide reference, trigger, and idempotency suffix fields.
admin.integrationGenericSyncHint: For product and price sync jobs, target products and retry limit are usually sufficient.
admin.integrationStockSyncReferenceHint: Example: order number, stock count number, or manual operation reference.
admin.integrationValidationEntityIds: Enter at least one valid entity id.
admin.integrationValidationQueueLimit: Queue limit must be between 1 and 100.
admin.searchKeywordsHint: Add comma-separated keywords to improve internal product search.
admin.brandsDescription: Define brands centrally and use them as selectable data in product forms.
admin.productAttributesDescription: Manage variant and product attribute definitions centrally. Product forms select from this shared source.
admin.variantAxesHint: Select the axes that variants should use, then define the matching values on each variant.
admin.variantsHint: You can override SKU, price and images for each variant separately.
admin.variantEmptyState: No variants yet. Select axes first, then create variants.
admin.variantAxisDeleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this variant axis definition?
admin.variantAxisDeleteBlocked: This variant axis cannot be deleted right now.
admin.generateVariantsHint: Enter comma-separated values for each axis. The system will generate all combinations and skip ones that already exist.
admin.generateVariantsEmptyAxes: Select at least one variant axis before bulk generating variants.
admin.alertLowMargin: Margin looks low. Reviewing price or cost structure may help.
admin.alertSlowSales: The item is in stock but sales velocity is weak. Campaign, visibility, or pricing should be reviewed.
admin.alertStockRisk: Stock value may be high relative to sales pace. Rebalance supply and warehouse decisions.
admin.alertHealthy: The product looks balanced. Current sales and stock structure appears healthy.
admin.productImportHint: For CSV import, references such as brand, supplier, category, and warehouse must already exist in the system. Import does not create these records automatically.
admin.additionalImageUrlsHint: Enter one URL per line. The first field is the main image, these are shown as extra gallery images.
admin.validationStock: Stock must be an integer greater than or equal to 0.
admin.validationCompareAtPrice: Compare-at price must be greater than the sale price.
admin.validationImageUrl: Please enter a valid image URL.
admin.validationImageUrls: All additional image URLs must be valid.
admin.validationImageUrlsLimit: You can add up to 6 images in total.
admin.validationVariantRequired: Please fill title, slug, SKU and option summary for each variant.
admin.validationVariantAttributes: Please enter values for all selected variant axes on each variant.
admin.validationVariantImageUrl: Please enter a valid image URL for the variant.
admin.imageUploadFailed: Image upload failed. Please try again.
admin.imageUploadHint: You can upload PNG, JPG, WebP, AVIF, or GIF. Max size 8MB.
admin.featuresHint: Add feature rows and mark selected rows as featured highlights.
admin.validationDeleteCategoryBlocked: Cannot delete a category that still has products.
admin.validationDateRange: End date cannot be earlier than start date.
admin.documentsDescription: Manage e-invoice, e-dispatch, purchase, and inventory-linked documents in one place.
admin.documentsSearch: Search document, counterparty, order, or transaction
admin.documentsPendingInvoicesDescription: Track delivery notes that have not yet been converted into e-invoices on a dedicated operational route. List and detail stay on the same route without mixing modules.
admin.documentsPendingInvoicesEmpty: No delivery notes waiting for invoicing.
admin.documentsPendingInvoicesQueueInvoiceSucc: E-invoice created and queued for dispatch.
admin.documentsPendingInvoicesQueueInvoiceFail: E-invoice was created but could not be queued for dispatch.
admin.documentsProvidersDescription: Manage document providers on a separate surface; define credentials, the default provider, and status sync support here.
admin.documentsWebhooksDescription: See provider callback endpoints and the webhook flow in one place. This keeps operational forms lighter and technical details separate.
admin.documentsWebhookHint: When the real provider arrives, callback requests will be processed through this signed webhook flow.
admin.suppliersDescription: Define supplier cards centrally so product, document, and finance modules can consume one shared source.
admin.customerAccountsDescription: Define trade customer accounts centrally so document and finance surfaces select from a shared source instead of free text.
admin.financeOverviewDescription: Manage finance as a separate operational surface. Receivables and payables stay on their own routes while this page keeps the summary light.
admin.financeSupplierPayablesDescription: Build an operational payables view by grouping purchase, delivery note, and e-invoice records from the document module through the service layer.
admin.financeSupplierPayablesSearch: Search supplier, document, order, or inventory transaction
admin.financeSupplierPayableDetailDescription: Inspect supplier-linked payable documents on a separate detail route while document operations remain in the documents module.
admin.financeReceivablesDescription: Creates an operational receivables view from current order and payment statuses without introducing a new ledger table in this phase.
admin.financeReceivableDetailDescription: Inspect the receivable record on a separate detail route while order operations remain in the orders module.
admin.financeAccountsDescription: Combines payable and receivable operations into a focused movement list without merging entire modules into one screen.
admin.financeReportsDescription: Review receivable, payable, and account-entry summaries on a decision surface while keeping operations on their separate routes.
admin.financeCollectionsDescription: Track open receivable records as a collection-readiness list. A real collection record model can be added later on a separate surface.
admin.financeCollectionsCreateRecordFailed: Collection record could not be created.
admin.financeCollectionDetailDescription: Inspect the collection-readiness record on a separate detail route while order operations remain in the orders module.
admin.financePaymentsDescription: Track supplier payables as a payment-readiness list. A real payment record model can later be expanded as its own module.
admin.financePaymentsCreateRecordFailed: Payment record could not be created.
admin.financePaymentDetailDescription: Inspect the payment-readiness record on a separate detail route while document operations remain in the documents module.
admin.inventorySummaryDescription: Current stock distribution across synchronized inventory records.
admin.inventoryNoRecentMovements: No recent movement in this warehouse.
admin.inventoryDrawerInfo: Review warehouse-level inventory details and apply stock updates.
admin.inventoryWarehousesDescription: Manage warehouse definitions in a drawer form.
admin.inventoryCriticalStockDescription: Track warehouse inventory rows at critical level and active alerts.
admin.inventoryReportsDescription: Track warehouse distribution, stock valuation, movement summary, and 30-day trend at a glance.
admin.inventoryQuickActionDescription: Mobilde kameraya yakın barkod akışı, masaüstünde barkod okuyucu ve manuel SKU girişi için tek hızlı işlem alanı.
admin.inventoryQuickActionCameraUnsupported: Bu cihaz veya tarayıcı kamera ile barkod okuma özelliğini desteklemiyor.
admin.inventoryQuickActionCameraDenied: Kamera izni verilmedi veya kamera açılamadı.
admin.inventoryQuickActionNoMatch: Bu barkod veya SKU için eşleşen ürün bulunamadı.
admin.inventoryQuickActionScannerHint: Telefon, USB barkod okuyucu ve manuel klavye girişi aynı alan üzerinden desteklenir. Okuyucu Enter gönderiyorsa işlem doğrudan tetiklenir.
admin.inventoryQuickActionRememberedMode: Son seçilen hızlı işlem modu hatırlanır.
admin.inventoryQuickActionAutoOpenHint: Kamera barkodu okuduğunda ürün seçilen modda otomatik açılır.
admin.inventoryQuickActionFastModeDescription: Ürünü drawer açmadan miktar girip doğrudan işle.
admin.inventoryQuickActionSerialModeHint: Başarılı işlemden sonra alan temizlenir ve bir sonraki barkod için odak geri gelir.
admin.inventoryIntegrationDescription: Monitor outbound channel stock sync jobs, dead letters, and latest dispatches.
admin.inventoryConsistencyDescription: Shows transition gaps between the inventory aggregate and the legacy Product.stock field.
admin.inventoryNoConsistencyIssues: No legacy fallback or stock mismatch detected.
admin.inventoryReportFiltersDescription: Rapor kartlarını kategori, ürün tipi, depo, stok durumu, rezervasyon ve hareket tipine göre daraltın.
admin.inventoryVelocityDescription: Top stock items by outbound quantity in the last 30 days.
admin.inventorySlowMovingDescription: Products sitting in stock with little or no recent movement.
admin.inventoryAbcDescription: Distribution of A, B, and C segments by estimated sales value.
admin.inventoryStockCountDescription: Create count slips in a drawer form, enter counted rows, and apply variances.
admin.inventoryStockCountSaveFailed: Stock count could not be created.
admin.inventoryStockCountApplyFailed: Stock count could not be applied.
admin.inventoryStockCountLineSaveFailed: Count line could not be saved.
